===================
=== 2001-10-23 Orpheum Theatre, Sioux City, Iowa, USA.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan and his band:
Orpheum Theatre
Sioux City, Iowa
October 23, 2001

One more, amigo...

Lineage:
Olav Remaster:
DVD+R > FLAC files copied to HDD > decoded to WAV > CoolEdit 2000 (checked; tracks OK except for:
Summer Days: 3 dropouts/statics
Cats In The Well: 3x dropouts
LARS: several dropouts
Honest With Me: 1x dropout
"Blowin' In The Wind": 1x dropout; (spotable in a WAV editor, now removed and hardly audible) > T-RackS v2.0 (overall volume boosted +4.0dB; Tube-Comp "ON" to add bundled softness, clearer sound and healthy vibrato; stereo enhancement +3.0dB; no overall EQ on any track!) > FLAC frontend (aligned on sector boundaries) > encoded to FLAC files > DIME

IMHO: another excellent to superb recording

SETLIST:

01. Wait For The Light To Shine (Fred Rose)
02. Mama, You Been On My Mind
03. A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall
04. Searching For A Soldier's Grave (Johnnie Wright, Jim Anglin, Jack Anglin)
05. Down Along The Cove
06. Floater (Too Much To Ask)
07. Tell Me That It Isn't True
08. High Water (for Charley Patton)
09. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right
10. Boots Of Spanish Leather
11. Masters Of War

12. Summer Days
13. Sugar Baby
14. Cold Irons Bound
15. Cat's In The Well
16. Love Sick
17. Like A Rolling Stone
18. If Dogs Run Free
19. Honest With Me
20. Blowin' In The Wind


Concert # 1360 of The Never-Ending Tour
Concert # 12 of the 2001 US Fall Tour
2001 concert # 83. 

Concert # 265 with the 12th Never-Ending Tour Band:
Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar)
Charlie Sexton (guitar)
Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar)
Tony Garnier (bass)
David Kemper (drums & percussion)

14, 911, 18, 20 acoustic with the band
2, 9 Bob Dylan (harmonica)
2 Larry Campbell (bouzouki)
1, 4, 20 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals)

NOTE: Live debut of Floater (Too Much To Ask)

9 new songs (45%) compared to previous concert
4 new songs for this tour

Stereo audience recording, 125 minutes

* * * Enjoy your Bobby Hobby * * *
